content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market weak with Nifty -0.75%, IT sector collapsing -3.27% on Infosys/HCLTech weak guidance, VIX up 3.4% to 19.22 showing elevated fear. Book is 79% deployed — right at the 80% cap with zero remaining capacity for new entries. Deployment hysteresis rule applies: focus on position management, not new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 36,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Current SL at 1704.81 is ABOVE CMP of 1696.50 — the SL has effectively been breached intraday (day low 1685.60). Stock formed bullish marubozu yesterday but gapped up and faded hard today (-2.33%). Q4 results pending in May with prior Q1 showing -25% PAT decline — asymmetric risk into results at 52-week high. Book the +3% gain cleanly rather than wait for stop to fill worse."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 984.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven (984). Holding for momentum continuation post IND AAA upgrade + record Q4. No change needed — emitting HOLD via position_actions instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "new_target": 1150.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock at 52-week high with Q4 results due April 27 — binary event. Tightening SL from 1030 to 1040 (still below entry of 1049 but closer) protects against post-result gap-down. Thesis (relative strength in weak banking sector, strong business update with +25% advances) intact. Net R/R still acceptable; pre-event SL tightening is prudent."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 675.00,
      "new_target": 740.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +1.5%, near 52-week high. Trail SL from 665 to 675 to reduce risk. Shooting star on Apr 22 is a caution flag but Apr 23 closed strong. USFDA Chantilly inspection awaiting final classification."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -5.9% but SL at 75 still intact (CMP 76.38). Fundamentals strong (Q4 PAT +34.9%, GNPA 1.45%). Post-results pop has faded but thesis not broken. Hold to SL; if 75 breaks, auto-exit will trigger."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge with VIX rising. SL at 119 gives room; CMP 123.23 comfortably above. No adjustment needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "At 52-week high, +0.6% vs entry. P&L not yet at +2% trail trigger. FMCG showing relative strength on a weak day. SL at 1385 is appropriate."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -1.2%, SL at 2260 intact. Q4 results April 30 — binary catalyst pending. FMCG sector supportive. Hold to SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -0.9%, SL at 388 intact. Defensive PSU utility, summer demand catalyst. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat, SL at 205 intact. Q4 concall April 29 — JM Financial expects -12.3% YoY PAT, stock trading 20% above consensus target. Considered exit but SL gives protection. Watch closely; will reassess closer to concall."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 75.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at 75 intact. Fundamentals strong; allow SL to work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 984.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven. Wait for move to +2% before trailing further."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; keep room for volatility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL effectively breached (1704.81 above CMP 1696.50). Book gain now before results risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1385.00,
      "reasoning": "Only +0.6% — below trail threshold. Let it breathe near 52w high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening ahead of April 27 Q4 results to manage binary event risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 675.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail from 665 to 675 to reduce risk on +1.5% winner near 52w high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2260.00,
      "reasoning": "Underwater; SL intact. Q4 results April 30."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "reasoning": "Mild drawdown within noise; SL at 388 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 205.00,
      "reasoning": "Flat. Q4 concall April 29 is the key event; may tighten SL on next cycle."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "OFSS stands out — 51% operating margin, 31% PAT growth, product-led BFSI model decoupled from IT services bloodbath. Would consider on a pullback but book is full. DRREDDY bounce is tariff-pause driven, not adding. ICICIBANK Q4 beat worth tracking if banking sector weakness creates entry. INFY — avoid, falling knife with 200-300bps guidance miss.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 79% deployed with only INR 14,553 headroom — effectively no capacity for new entries per the 80% cap AND deployment hysteresis rule. Multiple positions have pending binary Q4 catalysts (AUBANK Apr 27, ADANIPOWER Apr 29, HINDUNILVR Apr 30, DRREDDY/Nestle already reported). Sector concentration: Power cluster = TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER (exiting TORNTPOWER reduces this). Financial cluster = MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK. FMCG = NESTLEIND + HINDUNILVR. Focus for rest of session: management, not accumulation. VIX +3.4% and IT collapse argue for defensive posture."
}
